description: Condensed cultural wisdom passed through generations in memorable form. Proverb encompasses ancestral teaching, truth in metaphor, the distillation of collective experience, and the understanding that proverbs plant seeds of wisdom in young minds.
rationale: The word 'shiola' flows from gentle 'shi' through open 'o' (creating vowel hiatus) to light 'la'. This three-syllable journey captures proverbs as gentle wisdom opening into illumination.
